title: phlomoides jeholensis
intro: Phlomoides jeholensis, also known as Jehol sage, is a perennial plant species native to China, belonging to the Lamiaceae family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which have been attributed to its bioactive compounds such as flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Phlomoides jeholensis include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and exhibit antimicrobial properties. Herbal preparations of Phlomoides jeholensis are typically made from its leaves and flowers, and may be consumed as teas, infusions, or in capsule form, although more research is needed to fully understand its effects on human health.
